message.content: Find the signup/login CSS file(s) in client/src/components/ that contain the editorial design patterns like .primary-button, .auth-input, .auth-form-card, CSS variables like --bg-card, --bg-primary, --border-card, --shadow-modal, --text-heading, --text-muted, --accent-amber, --bg-backdrop-heavy, --shadow-card-sm. Also find where CSS variables are defined (likely in a global CSS file or :root). I need the exact variable names and values. Search thoroughly - check index.css, App.css, global.css, variables.css, and any signup/login CSS files.

content.text: I'll help you find the signup/login CSS files and identify the CSS variables used in the editorial design. Let me search thoroughly through the client/src directory.
Great! I found the auth-related CSS files. Now let me read them along with the global CSS files to find the variable definitions and design patterns:
